scripts.stop: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pidPath='./data/.pid';if(!fs.existsSync(pidPath)){console.log('No pid file at',pidPath);process.exit(0);}const pid=Number(fs.readFileSync(pidPath,'utf8').trim());if(!pid){console.log('Invalid pid');process.exit(1);}try{process.kill(pid,'SIGTERM');console.log('Stopped pid',pid);}catch(e){console.error('Failed to stop pid',pid, e.message);process.exit(1);}"
